things.name: Tampere Cathedral
things.description: National Romantic masterpiece with Hugo Simberg's frescoes including The Wounded Angel

things.name: Vapriikki Museum Centre
things.description: Excellent museum complex in a historic factory with natural history, ice hockey and more

things.name: Tampere Hall
things.description: One of Northern Europe's largest and most acclaimed concert and conference venues

things.name: Nasinneula Observation Tower
things.description: Finland's tallest building at 168m with a revolving restaurant and panoramic views

things.name: Sarkanniemi Amusement Park
things.description: Major theme park with dolphinarium, aquarium and Finland's highest observation tower

things.name: Pyynikki Ridge & Observation Tower
things.description: Esker ridge between two lakes with Finland's oldest open-air theatre and renowned doughnuts

things.name: Moomin Museum
things.description: World's only Moomin museum with original illustrations by Tove Jansson

things.name: Lenin Museum
things.description: Only Lenin museum in the world outside Russia in the building where Lenin met Stalin

things.name: Finlayson Factory Area
things.description: Historic cotton mill complex reinvented as shops, restaurants and cinema

things.name: Laukontori Harbour
things.description: Beautiful lakeside square with summer market, outdoor dining and passenger boats
